budget_policy.allowed_budget: 0 blocking gate failures after a PASS receipt
budget_policy.burn_action: mark stage BLOCKED and prevent READY handoff
budget_policy.escalation_action: write failure-class receipt and route to repair stage

requirements.description: Stage validation must fail closed when required artifacts or predecessor checks are missing.
requirements.threshold: 100% of required predecessor/bundle checks must pass before READY handoff
requirements.verification_method: receipt predecessor_verification and gate verdict inspection

requirements.description: Every delivered bundle must include a checksum sidecar and pass ZIP integrity validation.
requirements.threshold: zipfile.testzip == None and SHA-256 equals sidecar

requirements.description: No validator may accept unknown or placeholder thresholds for blocking requirements.
Packet result hashes must be stable and recomputable from canonical JSON.
Governed stages must remain bounded enough for ChatGPT mobile operator use.
requirements.threshold: one ZIP plus one checksum sidecar per stage
requirements.verification_method: final response and receipt artifact check

tradeoffs.decision: prefer bounded verification with receipts over broad unverified implementation
tradeoffs.rationale: MPP must preserve artifact trust in a turn-bounded mobile ChatGPT workflow.
